name: Anchovy Pasta
ingredients: 45g of anchovy fillets, drained and chopped
instructions: Heat oil in a medium frying pan over medium heat; cook and stir garlic and anchovies for 2 minutes.
Stir in breadcrumbs and turn off heat. Add parsley and lemon juice. Season with freshly ground black pepper. Stir to combine together.
Toss anchovy sauce with hot pasta and sprinkle with the parmesan cheese and serve.
